builder_rules.detail_edit_navigation: Use canonical path /{resource}/{id}/edit from custom detail pages unless the actual route name is discovered from router registration.
builder_rules.notes: Use concrete inverse relation methods, not dynamic resolveRelationUsing, when pivot events/timeline/changelog are involved.
builder_rules.media: Resource must implement Mediable; model must use HasMedia and implement Resourceable contract for pivot changelog compatibility. Detail response must include media relation for persistence.
